case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. VS. CAMPOVIDA, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOVIDA, LLC HOPLAND BREWING COMPANY, LLC CAMPOVIDA WINES, LLC $39,522.27 PRINCIPAL, $1,678.65 INTEREST, $543.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $41,743.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100088978)
